title: Dark Fantasy
description: A collection of dark fantasy mods to enhance your witchy existence
body:
A collection of dark fantasy mods to enhance your witchy existence. 

Suggestions are appreciated, but may or may not be implemented based on a focus group.

**Includes the following All Rights Reserved mods**:

- Bewitchment - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bewitchment
- Bewitchment Plus - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bewitchment-plus
- Xaero's Minimap - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap
- Xaero's World Map - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map

Clip art vector created by brgfx - www.freepik.com
